allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-Command node,npm,pnpm,yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Source; Write-Output "--- fnm/nvm ---"; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs", "$env:APPDATA\\nvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe")
